micropython.source:
from microbit import *

a = 0
b = 0
display.show(0)

while True:
    if button_a.is_pressed():
        a += 1
        display.scroll(a)
    elif button_b.is_pressed():
        b += 1
        display.scroll(b)
    if accelerometer.was_gesture('shake'):
        display.scroll('A')
        display.scroll(a)
        sleep(1000)
        display.clear()
        sleep(2000)
        display.scroll('B')
        display.scroll(b)
